hub.title: The Complete Digital Product Creator's Guide to Building a 6-Figure Business in 2024
hub.description: A comprehensive blueprint for digital creators to transform their expertise into profitable digital products. Covers everything from product ideation and creation to launching and scaling your digital product business, with proven strategies from successful creators.
hub.targetAudience: Digital creators and online entrepreneurs at any stage looking to monetize their knowledge through digital products

spokes.title: Digital Product Pricing Psychology: How to Set Profit-Maximizing Price Points That Convert
spokes.description: Deep dive into the psychological aspects of pricing digital products, including tiered pricing structures and value-based pricing models. Features actual case studies and conversion data from successful digital product launches.
spokes.targetAudience: Digital creators struggling with pricing strategy and conversion optimization

spokes.title: Creating High-Converting Product Pages: A Technical Guide for Digital Creators
spokes.description: Technical walkthrough of optimizing digital product pages for maximum conversions, including copywriting frameworks, social proof placement, and checkout optimization. Includes step-by-step implementation guides.
spokes.targetAudience: Online entrepreneurs focused on improving their digital product sales pages

spokes.title: Email Marketing Automation for Digital Product Creators: Launch Sequence Blueprint
spokes.description: Step-by-step guide to creating automated email sequences that drive digital product sales. Includes pre-launch, launch, and post-purchase sequence templates with proven conversion metrics.
spokes.targetAudience: Digital creators looking to automate their product marketing and increase sales

spokes.title: Digital Product Analytics: Essential Metrics and KPIs for Creator Success
spokes.description: Comprehensive guide to tracking and analyzing crucial metrics for digital product success. Covers sales metrics, customer behavior analysis, and optimization strategies based on data insights.
spokes.targetAudience: Data-driven digital creators and small business owners selling digital products
